---
title: "TimeSeries2-ARIMA"
author: "Agata Corinna"
date: "2026-04-19"
output: html_document
---

# Input Data
```{r}
library(tseries)
library(forecast)

data_ts <- AirPassengers

# plot awal
plot(data_ts, main="Data AirPassengers", ylab="Jumlah Penumpang", xlab="Tahun")
```

### Cek Stationeritas
```{r}
adf.test(data_ts)

lambda <- BoxCox.lambda(data_ts)
cat("Lambda Box-Cox optimal:", lambda,"\n")
```

### Differencing
```{r}
diff_ts <- diff(data_ts)
plot(diff_ts, main = "Data Setelah Differencing (d=1)", ylab = "Diff", xlab = "Tahun")

# Cek ulang stasioneritas
adf.test(diff_ts)
```

### Cek Orde (ACF & PACF)
```{r}
acf(diff_ts,  main = "ACF Setelah Differencing")
pacf(diff_ts, main = "PACF Setelah Differencing")
```



### Estimasi Model Arima
```{r}
model1 <- arima(data_ts, order = c(1, 1, 0))
model2 <- arima(data_ts, order = c(0, 1, 1))
model3 <- arima(data_ts, order = c(2, 1, 1))

# Bandingkan AIC
AIC(model1, model2, model3)
# Pilih model dengan AIC terkecil

summary(model3)
```

### Diagnostic Checking
```{r}
res <- residuals(model3)

# --- 5a. Cek Mean & Varians ---
cat("Mean residual  :", mean(res), "\n")
cat("Varians residual:", var(res), "\n")

# --- 5b. Plot Residual ---
plot(res, main = "Plot Residual Model ARIMA(2,1,1)",
     ylab = "Residual", xlab = "Waktu")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2)

# --- 5c. ACF Residual Manual ---
acf_manual <- function(x, lag_max) {
  n       <- length(x)
  x_mean  <- mean(x)
  acf_vals <- numeric(lag_max)

  for (k in 1:lag_max) {
    num          <- sum((x[(k + 1):n] - x_mean) * (x[1:(n - k)] - x_mean))
    den          <- sum((x - x_mean)^2)
    acf_vals[k]  <- num / den
  }

  return(acf_vals)
}

plot_acf_manual <- function(x, lag_max) {
  acf_vals <- acf_manual(x, lag_max)
  n        <- length(x)
  ci       <- 1.96 / sqrt(n)
  lags     <- 1:lag_max

  plot(
    lags, acf_vals,
    type = "h", lwd = 2, col = "steelblue",
    main = "ACF Manual Residual",
    xlab = "Lag", ylab = "ACF",
    ylim = c(min(acf_vals) - 0.1, max(acf_vals) + 0.1)
  )
  abline(h =  ci, col = "blue", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
  abline(h = -ci, col = "blue", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
  abline(h =  0,  col = "black", lwd = 1)
  legend("topright",
         legend = c("ACF Residual", "CI 95%"),
         col    = c("steelblue", "blue"),
         lty    = c(1, 2), lwd = 2, bty = "n")
}

plot_acf_manual(res, lag_max = 20)

# Verifikasi dengan fungsi bawaan R
acf(res, main = "ACF Residual (Bawaan R)")

# --- 5d. Uji Ljung-Box Manual ---
ljung_box_manual <- function(x, lag) {
  n        <- length(x)
  acf_vals <- acf_manual(x, lag)   # gunakan ACF manual yang sudah dibuat

  Q <- 0
  for (k in 1:lag) {
    Q <- Q + (acf_vals[k]^2) / (n - k)
  }
  Q       <- n * (n + 2) * Q
  p_value <- 1 - pchisq(Q, df = lag)

  return(list(Q_stat = round(Q, 4), p_value = round(p_value, 4)))
}

hasil_lb <- ljung_box_manual(res, lag = 10)
cat("=== Hasil Uji Ljung-Box Manual (lag=10) ===\n")
cat("Q statistik :", hasil_lb$Q_stat,  "\n")
cat("p-value     :", hasil_lb$p_value, "\n")


# Verifikasi dengan fungsi bawaan R
Box.test(res, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")

# --- 5e. Interpretasi Otomatis ---
cat("\n=== KESIMPULAN DIAGNOSTIC CHECKING ===\n")
cat("Mean residual mendekati 0   :", abs(mean(res)) < 0.5, "\n")
if (hasil_lb$p_value > 0.05) {
  cat("Ljung-Box p-value =", hasil_lb$p_value,
      "> 0.05 → Residual adalah WHITE NOISE → Model ARIMA(2,1,1) BAIK\n")
} else {
  cat("Ljung-Box p-value =", hasil_lb$p_value,
      "< 0.05 → Masih ada autokorelasi → Model perlu diperbaiki\n")
}
```
